name: light-engine-agents
description: Enforced multi-agent workflow for Light Engine Foxtrot development

untrustedWorkspaces.description: This extension requires trust to access the language model API.

chatParticipants.name: le-implementation
chatParticipants.description: Implementation Agent - Proposes solutions with verification

commands.name: propose
commands.description: Propose a solution for the given task

chatParticipants.name: le-review
chatParticipants.description: Review Agent - Validates scope and catches hallucinations

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate a proposal from Implementation Agent

chatParticipants.name: le-architecture
chatParticipants.description: Architecture Agent - Strategic assessment and mission alignment

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Assess approved proposal for strategic fit
